news.headline: Hill-Lopes Scholars Program at Towson Univ celebrates 5 years supporting women in STEM and male-dominated fields.
news.summary: Located in Towson, Maryland, the leading program for women in STEM, known as TUHillLopes, has reached a significant milestone by commemorating its fifth anniversary. This initiative has been instrumental in aiding women students who are venturing into industries predominantly dominated by men.

news.headline: Reworld™ supports veterans by distributing essential items at Nassau County Veterans Service Agency's Stand Down Event.
news.summary: In Freeport, New York, on December 3, 2024, Reworld™, a renowned provider of sustainable waste solutions, offered assistance to veterans at the Veterans Stand Down event in Freeport Armory. This gathering, attended by community groups, officials, and -importantly- local veterans, is an annual initiative aimed at supporting former servicemen and women.

news.headline: The 2025-26 FAFSA is out, with $100 billion up for grabs. Completing it early is crucial due to limited aid availability.
news.summary: The Free Application for Federal Student Aid (FAFSA) for the academic year 2025-26 is now accessible to students and families. Filling out the FAFSA is a crucial step for those preparing for higher education, as it provides access to over $100 billion in scholarships, grants, and federal financial aid for college. Time is of the essence in completing the FAFSA, as certain school and state-based aid are limited and distributed on a first-come, first-served basis.

news.headline: Katten welcomes clients into latest Kattalyst Sponsorship Program, focusing on career growth through skill-building.
news.summary: In Chicago on December 3, 2024, Katten revealed their inclusion of new clients in the recent group of the Kattalyst Sponsorship Program. This program is designed to enhance the career development of team members by providing skill-building opportunities and leadership coaching. This current cohort signifies the company's dedication to nurturing talent and fostering growth, with a focus on professional advancement.

news.headline: Amtrak sets record with 32.8M riders in FY24, invests $4.5B in infrastructure for growth.
news.summary: Amtrak has recently invested over $4.5 billion in significant infrastructure projects to bolster future expansion. This move comes as the company celebrates reaching a new milestone in Fiscal Year 2024, with an unprecedented 32.8 million customers utilizing their services. This surge in demand showcases the increasing popularity of passenger rail travel.

news.headline: Skin packaging market set to grow by $8.17B (2024-2028) on rising demand in meat packaging, AI impacts trends - Technavio.
news.summary: In a recent report, it has been revealed that the market landscape is being reshaped by artificial intelligence (AI). The global skin packaging market is expected to witness significant growth, with an estimated increase of USD 8.17 billion projected from 2024 to 2028. According to Technavio, the market is anticipated to expand at a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 11.03% throughout the forecast period. This data indicates a substantial transformation in the market dynamics driven by AI technologies.

news.headline: Analyst maintains Buy rating on Apple with $256 target, citing iPhone cycle and App Store growth. App Store revenue up 15.2% YoY to $5.6B in FY25 Q1, total downloads reach 6.1B, China grows 9.0% YoY in November.
news.summary: BofA Securities analyst Wamsi Mohan reaffirmed a Buy rating on Apple Inc. (NASDAQ:AAPL) with a target price of $256. Mohan highlighted the ongoing iPhone upgrade cycle, positive effects on gross margin, and robust cash flows as reasons for maintaining the rating. According to Mohan, SensorTower data revealed that in the first quarter of fiscal year 2025, App Store revenues reached $5.6 billion after 64 days, marking a 15.2% year-over-year increase. Additionally, total downloads for iPhone and iPad grew by 7.4% year-over-year, totaling 6.1 billion. In November, global App Store revenue surged by 15.8% year-over-year, with China experiencing a 9.0% increase. For more details, the full story is accessible on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: US Anticipates 45Z Guidance Before End of Biden's Term
Vista Cardiac MRI software proves faster and better quality scans per two-year data from Brigham and Women’s Hospital.
news.summary: A recent study conducted at Brigham and Women’s Hospital in Palo Alto, California, revealed that the Vista Cardiac MRI acquisition software has significantly enhanced image quality and decreased scan duration. The findings demonstrated a notable improvement in the overall imaging process, leading to more precise results. This advancement is crucial as it also resulted in a reduction in scan time, benefiting both patients and healthcare professionals. The study underscores the software's effectiveness in enhancing cardiac MRI procedures, indicating its potential to streamline operations in medical facilities.

news.headline: New Relic collaborates with AWS, connecting New Relic AI with Amazon Q Business at AWS RE:INVENT in Vegas.
news.summary: In Las Vegas at AWS RE:INVENT, New Relic, an Intelligent Observability Platform, revealed its integration of New Relic AI with Amazon Q Business, AWS’ enterprise generative AI assistant. This collaboration aims to enhance complex workflow processes by offering profound insights and recommendations through the New Relic platform. By linking the two AI assistants, New Relic moves beyond basic API data retrieval to provide advanced intelligent solutions. This initiative signifies a strategic partnership that leverages the strengths of both platforms to improve operational efficiency.

news.headline: JBT Corp declares $0.10 quarterly dividend per share on December 3, 2024, payable on December 27 to shareholders.
news.summary: In Chicago, JBT Corporation (NYSE: JBT) revealed that a quarterly cash dividend of $0.10 per share for outstanding common stock was declared by its Board of Directors on December 3, 2024. This dividend is set to be paid on December 27, 2024, to stockholders of record as of the closing of business on December 13, 2024. JBT Corporation, a prominent global technology solutions provider in the food & beverage industry, is known for designing, producing, and servicing various sophisticated products.

news.headline: Global natural cosmetics market set to reach USD 76.5 billion by 2033, with a 5.4% CAGR growth. Rising consumer awareness and regulatory support driving market expansion. Increasing focus on sustainability and eco-friendliness. Influential role of social media in shaping consumer perceptions and demand. Emphasis on clean beauty trends and innovation in natural formulations. Key players like Global Bioenergies and The Body Shop leading with new sustainable product launches. Market growth driven by globalization and expansion of distribution channels.
news.summary: The global natural cosmetics market was valued at approximately USD 45.2 billion in 2023 and is expected to reach USD 47.6 billion in 2024, with projected growth to around USD 76.5 billion by 2033 at a CAGR of about 5.4%. Key factors driving market growth include increasing consumer awareness and demand for natural products, regulatory support and standards promoting natural ingredients, innovative product formulations, expansion of distribution channels, and the influence of clean beauty trends. Companies are also prioritizing sustainability and eco-friendliness throughout their supply chains. Key segments include product type, packaging type, consumer group, distribution channel, and region. Several partnerships and acquisitions have been noted in the market, such as Global Bioenergies introducing a new natural cosmetic ingredient and The Body Shop launching a vegan and cruelty-free perfume line. The report offers detailed insights on market trends, growth factors, and regional scope, covering North America, Europe, Asia Pacific, Middle East & Africa, and South & Central America.

news.headline: Vow ASA announces rights issue of 166,666,666 new shares. Subscription period began on Nov 25, 2024.
news.summary: Oslo, December 3, 2024: Vow ASA has announced the beginning of the subscription period for its fully underwritten rights issue. This will involve the issuance of 166,666,666 new shares in the Company as mentioned in the stock exchange announcement released on November 25, 2024.

news.headline: ECB's Holzmann hints at slight rate reduction next week, says cut will be minor.
CoreLogic report: US home prices stall in October with 3.4% annual growth, 0.02% increase from Sept.
news.summary: In Irvine, California, CoreLogic® announced the latest data on the U.S. housing market for October 2024. The CoreLogic Home Price Index (HPI™) revealed a 3.4% year-over-year growth in home prices, with a marginal 0.02% increase from September. The report indicated a near-stagnation in home price growth since the summer months, suggesting a consistent trend of flat growth. CoreLogic is a prominent provider of property information, analytics, and data-enabled solutions.

news.headline: Peter Todd supports space mining; economics could be feasible. He was alleged Satoshi Nakamoto by HBO.
news.summary: Despite Todd's denial, a recent HBO documentary suggested that he could be the true Satoshi Nakamoto, the alleged creator of Bitcoin. Satoshi Nakamoto is a pseudonymous individual or group behind the development of Bitcoin, a popular cryptocurrency with a market capitalization exceeding $1 trillion. Todd, a software developer, has been associated with Bitcoin development in the past. The documentary explores the mystery surrounding the identity of Satoshi Nakamoto, who remains unknown to the public. Todd's potential involvement in the creation of Bitcoin has piqued the interest of many in the crypto community.

news.headline: Mazda's November sales: 33,422 vehicles, up 20.6% from 2023, with YTD sales of 384,181. Seventh month of consecutive gains.
news.summary: In December 3, 2024, Mazda North American Operations (MNAO) based in Irvine, California announced a notable achievement in their sales performance. They revealed that November marked the seventh consecutive month of sales growth, with a total of 33,422 vehicles sold during the month. This represented a significant uptick of 20.6% compared to November of the previous year, 2023. Furthermore, the year-to-date sales for 2024 amounted to 384,181 vehicles.

news.headline: 361° launches Nikola Jokić's JOKER 1 signature shoe in Denver, aiming to disrupt the market.
news.summary: On December 3, 2024, in Denver, 361° introduced the JOKER 1, the inaugural signature shoe for NBA sensation and worldwide brand representative Nikola Jokić. This unveiling took place at Ball Arena and was part of a major launch event titled "Disrupting The Game." The event garnered significant attention as fans and industry insiders eagerly awaited this momentous occasion.

news.headline: Capstone Partners launches specialized Buy-Side M&A Advisory Group in Boston on Dec. 3, 2024, focusing on sponsor coverage.
news.summary: In a recent development, Capstone Partners, a prominent middle market investment banking firm based in Boston, has expanded its services by adding specialized Sponsor Coverage professionals to provide dedicated Buy-Side M&A advisory. This expansion aims to enhance Capstone's comprehensive suite of services. The announcement was made on December 3, 2024. This strategic move demonstrates Capstone's commitment to offering tailored solutions to its clients.

news.headline: Legrand acquires Power Bus Way, specializing in power feeder systems for data centers, industrial, and commercial use.
news.summary: Legrand®, a global expert in electrical and digital building infrastructures, recently disclosed the acquisition of a company in West Hartford, Connecticut on December 3, 2024. This move aims to ensure customers are provided with the appropriate system every time for delivering essential power to any project. This acquisition showcases Legrand®'s dedication to offering top-notch solutions for mission-critical power needs.

news.headline: Crude oil up by over 2%; US job openings rise by 372,000 to 7.744 million in October. Dow down 0.04%, Nasdaq up 0.11%, S&P 500 down 0.02%.
news.summary: In the midst of trading, U.S. stocks showed a mixed performance, with the Nasdaq Composite experiencing an increase on Tuesday. The Dow saw a decline of 0.04% to 44,765.78, while the NASDAQ climbed 0.11% to 19,424.83. The S&P 500 also dropped by 0.02% to 6,046.23. On the other hand, communication services sector shares surged by 0.2%, while industrials shares fell by 0.8% on the same day. In recent news, the number of job openings increased by 372,000 to reach 7.744 million in October, surpassing the previous month's revised figure of 7.372 million and beating market expectations of 7.48 million. Cheetah Net Supply Chain Service Inc. (NASDAQ:CTNT) stocks soared by 227% to $6.14 after the company announced the acquisition of TW & EW Services in a transaction involving both cash and stock.

news.headline: Naphthalene derivatives market projected to reach USD 5.04 billion by 2031 with a 3.5% CAGR growth, fueled by construction industry.
news.summary: On December 3, 2024, a recent report by The Insight Partners revealed that the global Naphthalene Derivatives Market is projected to experience substantial growth by 2031. This growth is primarily attributed to the expanding construction industry. The report provides comprehensive insights into market dynamics and recent developments. Key statistics and trends reveal the market's promising potential for the forecast period, with notable increases in market size, investments, and advancements in strategic initiatives.

news.headline: Credo Technology Group (NASDAQ:CRDO) exceeds Q2 expectations with earnings of 7 cents/share and $72.0 million sales. CEO anticipates revenue growth.
news.summary: Credo Technology Group Holding Ltd (NASDAQ:CRDO) revealed impressive second-quarter financial results and provided robust guidance. The company posted earnings of 7 cents per share for the quarter, surpassing the expected 5 cents per share. Additionally, Credo reported quarterly sales of $72.000 million, exceeding the anticipated $66.789 million. Bill Brennan, the President and CEO of Credo, highlighted the record revenue of $72.0 million, marking a 21% increase from the previous quarter and a 64% increase year over year. The quarter proved to be the company's most successful, driven by strong performance across all three product lines. Total product revenue amounted to $69.1 million in the second quarter. Credo has been anticipating a turning point in revenues over the last few quarters.

news.headline: Shipbroking market to grow by USD 263.7 million (2024-2028) driven by key value additions, AI transformation noted - Technavio.
news.summary: A recent report analyzing the effects of artificial intelligence on market patterns revealed that the global shipbroking market is projected to increase by approximately USD 263.7 million between 2024 and 2028. Research conducted by Technavio suggests a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of nearly 3.1% for the market during this period.

news.headline: Amazon introduces new capabilities for Amazon Q Developer at AWS re:Invent to accelerate app migration/up to 4x speed.
news.summary: In Las Vegas, at the AWS re:Invent event, Amazon Web Services, Inc. (AWS), a company under Amazon.com, Inc. (NASDAQ: AMZN), unveiled enhanced features for Amazon Q Developer. This AI assistant is a leader in software development and has been equipped with new functions to simplify intricate and time-consuming application migration and modernization tasks. These enhancements aim to streamline the process, ultimately saving customers and partners significant amounts of time and money. Notably, the updated capabilities enable users to modernize Windows .NET applications to Linux up to four times quicker.

news.headline: Dow Jones dips, Nvidia nears buy point, Meta breaks out; AI stock surges. S&P 500, Nasdaq remain unchanged.
news.summary: Stocks in the Dow Jones experienced a decline during early trading on Tuesday, while both the S&P 500 and Nasdaq remained steady. One notable increase was seen in Nvidia, which approached a potential buy point. Nvidia's rise comes as Meta achieved a breakout in today's stock market. Additionally, an AI company experienced a significant surge. This information was part of live coverage and updates provided by Investor's Business Daily.

news.headline: INTIMINA introduces new Bloom period underwear, expanding its menstrual hygiene offerings for women. #Empowerment.
news.summary: San Jose, California - On December 3, 2024, INTIMINA, a leading women's healthcare brand known for menstrual hygiene products and promoting female empowerment, expanded its offerings with the launch of the Bloom period product line. This move signifies the brand's commitment to breaking taboos and providing innovative solutions for women. The new products are now available for purchase online, offering a convenient shopping experience for customers.

news.headline: Harris Associates L.P. launches Oakmark U.S. Large Cap ETF (NYSE: OAKM) on Dec. 3, 2024.
news.summary: On December 3, 2024, Harris Associates L.P. (Harris|Oakmark), an affiliate of Natixis Investment Managers, introduced a new active ETF called OAKM. This ETF operates under the Oakmark U.S. Large Cap ETF (NYSE: OAKM) umbrella. OAKM is designed to pursue long-term capital growth through full transparency in its operations.

news.headline: Medical center offers non-invasive fat-burning and incontinence treatments with no pain, needles or downtime. Demo available on Dec 10.
news.summary: On December 10th, patients will have the opportunity to try out innovative procedures at the "All I Want for Christmas" party in SPRING GROVE, Illinois. For those wishing for body sculpting or pelvic floor strengthening, this event will provide a chance to experience cutting-edge, non-invasive techniques with no restrictions.

news.headline: Macro analyst Raoul Pal envisions a $100 trillion cap for the crypto market, predicting a technological revolution post-U.S. elections.
news.summary: Macro analyst Raoul Pal has predicted a significant shift in the world economy and financial markets due to rapid technological advancements and a changing political environment. During an interview on the Blockworks Macro podcast, Pal discussed a future he envisions as an "economic singularity" unfolding in the upcoming years. This transition period will be characterized by the transformative impact of AI, robotics, and blockchain technologies on a global scale. Pal credits the surge in technological progress to the growing influence of individuals such as Elon Musk and other tech leaders post the recent U.S. elections. For further details, the complete article can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Amazon introduced Amazon Nova at AWS re:Invent, offering state-of-the-art foundation models. Includes Amazon Nova Micro, Amazon Nova Lite, Amazon Nova Pro, and Amazon Nova Premier. #AI #tech
news.summary: In Las Vegas, during AWS re:Invent, Amazon.com Inc (NASDAQ: AMZN) unveiled Amazon Nova, a cutting-edge line of foundation models. These models, available in Amazon Bedrock, offer top-notch intelligence for various tasks with exceptional cost efficiency. The lineup consists of Amazon Nova Micro (a high-speed text-to-text model), and multi-modal models like Amazon Nova Lite, Amazon Nova Pro, and Amazon Nova Premier, capable of analyzing text, images, and videos. These models promise outstanding performance and affordability in the industry.

news.headline: Watercrest Buena Vista Senior Living honors resident veterans in a patriotic celebration for Veteran's Day with local community partners.
news.summary: In Vero Beach, Florida on December 3, 2024, veterans and spouses of veterans were honored at Watercrest Buena Vista Senior Living Community through a series of patriotic and ceremonial activities celebrating Veteran's Day. The event featured the participation of local community partners, enhancing the experience for the attendees.

news.headline: PublicSquare names Donald Trump Jr and Willie Langston to board of directors; effective Dec 3, 2024.
news.summary: PSQ Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: PSQH), known as PublicSquare, a key player in commerce and payments in the US, has introduced new members to its board of directors. Effective from December 3, 2024, the renowned Donald Trump Jr. and Willie Langston have joined the board. Michael Seifert, the Chairman and CEO of PublicSquare, expressed satisfaction with the appointments, emphasizing the value they will bring to the company's leadership. PublicSquare focuses on promoting life, family, and liberty within its ecosystem.

news.headline: CASETEAM launches as genAI-native & hybrid-first management consulting firm, integrating advanced genAI & human expertise to tackle complex challenges at unrivaled precision & efficiency.
news.summary: A management consulting firm named CASETEAM has launched in San Jose, California, presenting itself as one of the first genAI-native and hybrid-first firms globally. It integrates genAI technology with human insight and expertise to address intricate issues for various industries. This approach allows CASETEAM to provide exceptional solutions to clients swiftly and accurately. The company promises to revolutionize traditional management consulting methods with its innovative strategies.

news.headline: RiverID introduces FaceID system at Mâs Monumental with Veridas, allowing 85,000 fans easy ticketless entry per match.
news.summary: In Boston, RiverID has introduced a groundbreaking FaceID system at Mâs Monumental, making it the largest application of facial ticketing technology in any football stadium globally. Over 85,000 fans per match will benefit from this secure and efficient ticketless entry method starting next season. The initiative, developed in collaboration with Veridas, a prominent player in biometric technology and digital identity, is set to revolutionize the fan experience at the stadium.

news.headline: Pilot Wave Holdings increased credit facility with Aequum Capital from $6MM to $15MM for technology-focused growth.
news.summary: In Chicago on December 3, 2024, Pilot Wave Holdings, a prominent technology-focused acquisition and growth firm, announced the successful closure of an expansion of their current $6 million credit facility with Aequum Capital, now standing at $15 million. This increase in the credit facility enables Pilot Wave to access additional funds for borrowing purposes and further supports their operations and growth strategy.

news.headline: Alternatives, Inc. Dignity Gala on March 15th will honor Colgate-Palmolive and Somerset County Board. News released in Raritan, N.J. - Dec. 3, 2024.
news.summary: A fundraiser scheduled for March 15th, 2024, in Raritan, N.J., will honor Colgate-Palmolive, The Somerset County Board of Commissioners, and Board Member Joseph Westlein. Alternatives, Inc. has organized the event, celebrating over 30 years of community involvement. The fundraiser aims to recognize the contributions of these entities.

news.headline: Fed's Kugler: The US may be around full employment, but need to watch how potential trade, immigration changes could change that.
Fed's Kugler: Job report on Friday may well bounce back given the influence of storms and strikes on the prior report.
DCS Corporation wins prime position on $33B IAC Multiple-Award Contract from DTIC, Pool 1. Dec. 3, 2024.
news.summary: In Alexandria, Virginia on December 3, 2024, DCS Corporation received a prime contract from the Defense Technology Information Center (DTIC) under Pool 1 of the Information Analysis Center Multiple Award Contract (IAC MAC) program. This award is part of an indefinite-delivery/indefinite-quantity contract and signifies a notable achievement for DCS Corporation in the defense technology sector.

news.headline: Chemical company launches DURAPONTEX Grip insole for athlete control; high-performance solution for movement control.
news.summary: Leading foam manufacturer, Dahsheng Chemical (DSC®), has introduced their new product, DURAPONTEX Grip® in Portland, Ore., on Dec. 3, 2024. This innovative solution provides high-performance movement control. The product is designed to offer superior gripping capabilities for various applications. Dahsheng Chemical continues to be a key player in the industry, with an extensive range of foam products that cater to different market needs. This latest launch aims to address the demand for enhanced movement control, utilizing cutting-edge technology. Stay updated for more details on this groundbreaking development.

news.headline: A Step to Freedom's Warm the Streets LA marks 10 years and receives $1 million HUD grant for housing and homeless services.
news.summary: A Step to Freedom (ASF) in Los Angeles is commemorating the 10th anniversary of its Warm the Streets LA initiative with the announcement of a substantial $1 million grant from the United States Department of Housing and Urban Development's Community Project Funding for Fiscal Year 2024.

news.headline: Forté Orthopedic Research Institute's Hearts 2 Soles event in Indianapolis offers free foot exams, shoes, and socks for needy individuals to address foot health issues.
news.summary: In Indianapolis on December 3, 2024, the Forté Orthopedic Research Institute addressed the prevalent issue of foot health among individuals facing severe poverty and homelessness in Indiana and globally. The institute invites media coverage of the Hearts 2 Soles event, held in collaboration with partners.

news.headline: 65 counterparties take $161.572b at Fed Reverse Repo Operation.
Fed's Kugler: High rate of business formation could keep boosting productivity, but need to be attentive to how other policies may change that.
Stocks could be impacted by Trump's tariff threats sooner than expected.
GENYOUth adds 2 new board members in 2024, co-founded by dairy farmers and NFL, ensuring well-nourished kids.
news.summary: Announced on December 3, 2024, in New York, GENYOUth, a nonprofit organization founded by US dairy farmers and the National Football League (NFL) to promote healthy and active lifestyles among schoolchildren, named a new appointee. This initiative aims to support children's well-being through proper nutrition and physical activity.

news.headline: Tokenization could reshape finance with increasing interest in tokenized assets. Institutional investors looking to diversify portfolios.
news.summary: David Alderman from Franklin Templeton believes that tokenization has the potential to transform institutional investing, although there are barriers to its widespread adoption. Speaking at Benzinga’s Future of Digital Assets alongside Jennifer O'Rourke of DTCC Digital Assets, Alderman discussed how this technology could create a more interconnected market. He emphasized that tokenized assets are gaining traction, enabling institutions to diversify their portfolios and simplify transactions. While acknowledging that tokenization is still in its early phases, Alderman noted the keen interest from institutional investors in exploring its possibilities. Despite the obstacles, he highlighted the eagerness of institutional investors to get involved, stating that most of them are looking to incorporate tokenization into their strategies.

news.headline: Georgia-Pacific donated a fully furnished room to Ronald McDonald House in Camden, NJ. A heartwarming gesture to help families in need.
news.summary: A generous donation has been made by Georgia-Pacific as they have recently provided a fully furnished room to the Ronald McDonald House of Southern New Jersey. The donation was valued at $10,000 and serves as a heartfelt contribution to support families in need. This kind gesture showcases Georgia-Pacific's commitment to giving back to the community.

news.headline: Evive Brands celebrates all 4 brands named in Franchise Dictionary Magazine's Top 100 Game Changers of 2024.
news.summary: Evive Brands revealed on December 3, 2024, in Scottsdale, Arizona, that all of its four brands - Assisted Living Locators, Executive Home Care, Grasons, and The Brothers that just do Gutters - have earned spots in the Top 100 Game Changers in 2024 list by Franchise Dictionary Magazine.
